description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage that runs three jobs named node-10, node-6, and node-8. Each job uses the corresponding Docker image (node:10, node:6, node:8), runs a before_script step `npm install`, then executes `npm test` as its script, and connects to a dynamodb service defined as alias `dynamodb` using the image cnadiminti/dynamodb-local. All jobs set the variables AWS_DYNAMODB_ENDPOINT=http://dynamodb:8000, DATA_DIR=./test/data, and NODE_ENV=test. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
